goal: list_lower_bound(List.cons(head, tail), lower) = forall(x0: S) { List.cons(head, tail).contains(x0) implies lower <= x0 }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 <= x2 } = list_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1) }[S](List.cons(head, tail), lower)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x0 != x3 or x3 ∈ x2 }[S](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), head)
(forall(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ List.cons(head, tail) or lower <= x0 } = true)

proof: function[T0: JoinSemilattice](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0], x3: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x3.join(list_join[T0](x0, x1)) = list_join[T0](x3, x2) }[S](next_tail, rest_tail, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail), h)

goal: list_join(h, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(n, r)) = list_join(h, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(n, r))

proof: function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S, x2: S, x3: List[S]) { list_join(x1, x0 + List.cons(x2, x3)) = list_join(x1, x0).join(list_join(x2, x3)) } = p(x0) }(List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail))
let w0: S satisfy { exists(k0: S, k1: List[S]) { list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(k0, k1)) != list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(k0, k1)) } }
let w1: S satisfy { exists(k2: List[S]) { list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(w1, k2)) != list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(w1, k2)) } }
let w2: List[S] satisfy { list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(w1, w2)) != list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(w1, w2)) }
let w3: S satisfy { exists(k3: List[S]) { list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(w3, k3)) != list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(w3, k3)) } }
let w4: List[S] satisfy { list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(w3, w4)) != list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(w3, w4)) }
let w5: List[S] satisfy { list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(w3, w5)) != list_join(w0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(w3, w5)) }
function(x0: S, x1: S, x2: List[S]) { list_join(x0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail) + List.cons(x1, x2)) = list_join(x0, List.cons(next_tail, rest_tail)).join(list_join(x1, x2)) }(w0, w3, w5)
function[T0](x0: List[T0] -> Bool) { not forall(x1: T0, x2: List[T0]) { not x0(x2) or x0(List.cons[T0](x1, x2)) } or not x0(List.nil[T0]) or forall(x3: List[T0]) { x0(x3) } = true }[S](p)
function[T0](x0: List[T0] -> Bool, x1: List[T0]) { not forall(x2: T0, x3: List[T0]) { not x0(x3) or x0(List.cons[T0](x2, x3)) } or not x0(List.nil[T0]) or x0(x1) }[S](p, tail)
let w0: S satisfy { exists(k0: List[S]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(w0, k0)) } }
let w1: List[S] satisfy { p(w1) and not p(List.cons(w0, w1)) }
let w2: List[S] satisfy { p(w2) and not p(List.cons(w0, w2)) }
function(x0: List[S], x1: S) { not p(x0) or p(List.cons(x1, x0)) }(w2, w0)
function(x0: List[S]) { forall(x1: S, x2: S, x3: List[S]) { list_join(x1, x0 + List.cons(x2, x3)) = list_join(x1, x0).join(list_join(x2, x3)) } = p(x0) }(tail)
function(x0: List[S]) { not p(x0) or forall(x1: S, x2: S, x3: List[S]) { list_join(x1, x0 + List.cons(x2, x3)) = list_join(x1, x0).join(list_join(x2, x3)) } = true }(tail)
function(x0: List[S], x1: S) { not p(x0) or forall(x2: S, x3: List[S]) { list_join(x1, x0 + List.cons(x2, x3)) = list_join(x1, x0).join(list_join(x2, x3)) } = true }(tail, head)
function(x0: List[S], x1: S, x2: S) { not p(x0) or forall(x3: List[S]) { list_join(x1, x0 + List.cons(x2, x3)) = list_join(x1, x0).join(list_join(x2, x3)) } = true }(tail, head, next)
function(x0: List[S], x1: S, x2: S, x3: List[S]) { not p(x0) or list_join(x1, x0 + List.cons(x2, x3)) = list_join(x1, x0).join(list_join(x2, x3)) }(tail, head, next, rest)

goal: list_meet(head, tail + List.cons(next, rest)) <= list_meet(head, tail)
list_meet(head, tail + List.cons(next, rest)) <= list_meet(next, rest)
list_join(head, tail) <= list_join(head, tail + List.cons(next, rest))
list_join(next, rest) <= list_join(head, tail + List.cons(next, rest))

proof: function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { x0 + List.singleton[T0](x1) = x0.append(x1) }[S](tail, last)
function[T0](x0: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, List.nil[T0]) = List.singleton[T0](x0) }[S](last)
function[T0: MeetSemilattice](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or list_meet[T0](x1, x0) = x1 }[S](List.nil[S], last)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { x0 + List.singleton[T0](x1) = x0.append(x1) }[S](tail, last)
function[T0](x0: T0) { List.cons[T0](x0, List.nil[T0]) = List.singleton[T0](x0) }[S](last)
function[T0: JoinSemilattice](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or list_join[T0](x1, x0) = x1 }[S](List.nil[S], last)
